# ***Newnal Technical Whitepaper and Patent List***

*List of Technical Whitepapers, Utility Patents, Design Patents, and Trademarks*

***February 2026***

# *Technical Whitepapers*

| *Newnal Web3 ai Technical Whitepaper‘My own ai’ (another-i) model that learns from personal data* | [![][image1]](https://infrablockchain.net/documents/web3ai-newnal/Web3ai-Newnal-Tech-1-Web3-ai.pdf) |
| :---- | ----: |
| ***Newnal Web3 ai OS Technical Whitepaper**Blockchain-based ‘Appless OS’ architecture for personal AI agents having Web3 ai-ID and Web3 ai-Contract* | [![][image1]](https://infrablockchain.net/documents/web3ai-newnal/Web3ai-Newnal-Tech-2-Web3-ai-OS.pdf) |
| ***Newnal Web3 Telecom Technical Whitepaper**Next-generation decentralized and secure communication protocol including AI-involved calls* | [![][image1]](https://infrablockchain.net/documents/web3ai-newnal/Web3ai-Newnal-Tech-3-Web3-Telecom.pdf) |
| ***Newnal ai Agent Place Technical Whitepaper**Marketplace for personal data and ai(another-i) agent service exchange* | [![][image1]](https://infrablockchain.net/documents/web3ai-newnal/Web3ai-Newnal-Tech-4-Newnal-ai-Agent-Place.pdf) |
| ***Newnal InfraBlockchain Technical Whitepaper**Stablecoin-native public federated multi-blockchain network and verifiable web data infrastructure* | [![][image2]](https://infrablockchain.net/documents/web3ai-newnal/Web3ai-Newnal-Tech-5-InfraBlockchain.pdf) |
| ***Universal Resource Auth (UR-Auth) Protocol and System Architecture Technical Whitepaper**Blockchain-based Web-scale Data Ownership Management Technology* | [![][image3]](https://infrablockchain.net/documents/Universal_Resource_Auth_Technical_Whitepaper_v0.7c.pdf) |
| ***InfraBlockchain Technical Whitepaper**Stablecoin as system tx fee token, Transaction-as-a-Vote, Proof-of-Transaction(PoT) consensus algorithm* | [![][image2]](https://infrablockchain.net/documents/InfraBlockchain_Technical_White_Paper_Version_2_4_ENG_202008.pdf) |
| ***ON/OFF-Chain Hybrid Token Exchange System Technical Whitepaper**Blockchain-based large-scale high frequency trading system technology* | [![][image2]](https://infrablockchain.net/documents/YOSEMITE_Hybrid_Exchange_Technical_White_Paper_20170731a.pdf) |
| ***InfraBlockchain-Substrate Multi-Blockchain Developer Documentation*** | [![][image2]](https://docs.infrablockchain.net/infrablockchain-docs/infrablockchain/learn/architecture/architecture) |
| ***InfraBlockchain-Antelope Developer Documentation*** | [![][image2]](https://docs.infrablockchain.net/infrablockchain-antelope) |
| ***InfraDID Method Specification*** | [![][image2]](https://github.com/InfraBlockchain/infra-did-method-specs/blob/main/docs/Infra-DID-method-spec.md) |
| ***InfraDID W3C DID Spec. Registry (did:infra)*** | [![][image2]](https://www.w3.org/TR/did-extensions-methods/) |
| ***InfraBlockchain Open-Source Technology*** | [![][image2]](https://github.com/infrablockchain) |

# *Patents*

| \[USPTO\] US-20250055712-A1*BLOCKCHAIN-BASED WEB DATA OWNERSHIP AND DATA ACCESS MANAGEMENT METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR TRACKING AI DATA COLLECTION* | [![][image4]](https://patentscope.wipo.int/search/en/detail.jsf?docId=US448394725) |
| :---- | ----: |
